_note: 履歷單一資料來源（中英雙語）。改完跑 build.py 就會同步網站與各平台文案。定位：法律科技 × 金融/虛擬資產法遵 × 會寫 AI/區塊鏈。project 用問題→做法→影響格式，usage 放真實使用數據（空則不顯示）。

profile.name: Elaine Chi

headline.en: Full-Stack & Web3 Developer | Solidity · JavaScript · ethers.js · Python · AI | I design & deploy smart contracts and ship dApps — with a law & finance edge
headline.zh: 全端・Web3 工程師 | Solidity・JavaScript・ethers.js・Python・AI | 設計並部署智慧合約、打造 dApp，兼具法律金融背景

title.en: Full-Stack & Web3 Developer · Smart Contracts · FinTech / LegalTech
title.zh: 全端・Web3 工程師 · 智慧合約 · 金融科技／法律科技

tagline.en: I build web & AI products — and I understand the law and finance behind them.
tagline.zh: 我打造網頁與 AI 產品，也懂背後的法律與金融。

profile.location: Taiwan · 開放遠端與海外機會 / Open to remote & overseas

zh: 區塊鏈／智慧合約工程師

summary.en:
Most people who understand financial law can't build software. Most engineers don't understand financial regulation. I do both.

I'm a Technology Law LL.M. candidate at NYCU (a top national university in Taiwan), specializing in financial crime, FinTech and virtual-asset (Web3) compliance. I've interned at the Financial Crimes Division of the Taipei District Court and the Financial Ombudsman Institution, and worked as a research assistant on white-collar crime and financial supervision.

But I don't just write legal memos — I ship. I've independently built and launched 6+ live web products (directing AI tools end to end), including a music-royalty smart contract I designed, tested and deployed to Ethereum with a wallet-connected dApp, and a financial dashboard combining market data with news sentiment.

I'm looking for developer roles — full-stack, Web3 / smart-contract, or AI-focused product work — where my law & finance background is a rare edge. Remote or international welcome.

Let's talk → chengyuchi849@gmail.com
summary.zh:
懂金融法規的人，通常不會寫程式；會寫程式的人，通常不懂金融法規。我，兩個都會。

我是陽明交通大學科技法律研究所碩士生，專攻金融犯罪、金融科技與虛擬資產（Web3）法遵。曾在台北地方法院金融重罪專庭（重金庭）、金融消費者評議中心實習，並擔任白領犯罪與金融監理的研究助理。

但我不只是寫法律報告——我做得出來。我獨立做出並上線了 6+ 個網頁產品（從頭到尾主導、用 AI 工具協作完成），包括我親手設計、測試並部署到 Ethereum 的音樂版稅智慧合約（含可連錢包的 dApp），以及結合行情與新聞情緒的金融儀表板。

我在找工程師職位——全端、Web3／智慧合約、或 AI 相關產品開發——而我的法律與金融背景會是別人沒有的優勢。遠端或海外尤佳。

聊聊 → chengyuchi849@gmail.com

items: 互動式網頁與 3D 視覺化
中英雙語與語音 (TTS) 介面
Claude Code / AI 工具主導開發
大型語言模型 (LLM) 應用

cat.zh: 領域優勢 · 法律金融

items: 金融刑事法 / 白領犯罪
金融監理 / 法令遵循
智慧財產權 / 著作權

experience.org: 台灣台北地方法院 · 金融重罪專庭（重金庭）

desc.en: Interned at the court division handling major financial-crime cases; observed financial-crime adjudication and case handling first-hand.
desc.zh: 於審理重大金融犯罪案件的專庭實習，實地接觸金融刑事審判流程與案件實務。

experience.org: 陽明交大科法所 · 白領犯罪 / 金融刑法研究

desc.en: Researched overseas anti-corruption (FCPA), financial supervision policy, loan fraud, mis-selling, trade-secret management, non-compete, and defense rights at the investigation stage; produced research briefings.
desc.zh: 研究海外反貪腐法(FCPA)、金融監理政策、金融詐貸、金融業不當銷售、營業秘密管理、國際競業禁止、偵查階段辯護權等金融刑事議題，並製作研究簡報。

desc.en: Hands-on with financial-consumer dispute resolution and ombudsman practice.
desc.zh: 參與金融消費爭議評議實務。

desc.en: TA for Copyright Law Seminar, Litigation Drafting, and Financial Law & Supervision.
desc.zh: 擔任著作權法專題、訴訟撰寫、金融法治與監理課程教學助教。

desc.en: Coordinated legal-consultation services; also delivered criminal-law legal-literacy outreach.
desc.zh: 統籌法律諮詢服務，並參與向陽公益基金會法治教育出隊之刑事法教育。

education.school: 國立陽明交通大學 National Yang Ming Chiao Tung University (NYCU)

degree.en: LL.M. Candidate, Institute of Technology Law (Law Group) — Thesis: legal integration of smart contracts with the Virtual Asset Service Act & music NFTs. GPA ~3.7. Notable: LLM Applications (A), Litigation Drafting (A+), White-Collar & Economic Criminal Law (A), Generative AI, Legal Tech & Informatics.
degree.zh: 科技法律研究所（法律組）碩士（在學）— 碩論：智慧合約之法制整合與智慧財產權保障，以虛擬資產服務法與音樂 NFT 為中心。GPA 約 3.7。亮點課程：大型語言模型應用與實作(A)、訴訟實務書狀撰寫(A+)、白領犯罪與經濟刑法(A)、生成式 AI、法律科技與法律資訊學。

role.zh: 獨立 — 智慧合約 + 完整 dApp

problem.en: Music royalty splits are opaque and manual — no transparent, automatic way to pay everyone their share.
problem.zh: 音樂版稅分潤黑箱又手動，沒有透明、自動把錢分給每個人的方式。

approach.en: Designed, tested (Foundry) and deployed a configurable royalty smart contract to Ethereum Sepolia — auto-splits any payment by share, with on-chain events, running totals and owner controls (add payee / change ratio). Built a wallet-connected dApp (ethers.js) with a live split chart and on-chain transaction history; verified the contract source on-chain.
approach.zh: 用 Foundry 設計、測試並部署一個可設定的版稅智慧合約到 Ethereum Sepolia — 付款自動按比例分帳，含鏈上事件、累計統計與擁有者權限（加人／改比例）。打造可連錢包的前端 dApp（ethers.js），含即時分潤圖與鏈上交易紀錄；合約原始碼已鏈上驗證。

impact.en: A fully working, publicly verifiable dApp — anyone can connect a wallet, pay, and watch royalties split on-chain in real time. Contract + tests + frontend, end to end.
impact.zh: 一個完整可運作、公開可驗證的 dApp — 任何人都能連錢包付款、即時看版稅在鏈上自動分帳。合約 + 測試 + 前端，一手包辦。

metrics.zh: 連錢包 + 即時交易紀錄

name.zh: 音樂版稅 OS · 智慧合約視覺化

role.en: Solo build (AI-assisted) · ties to my LL.M. thesis
role.zh: 獨立製作（AI 協作）· 呼應碩論主題

problem.en: Music royalty splits via smart contracts are opaque — stakeholders can't see how money actually flows on-chain.
problem.zh: 音樂版稅用智慧合約分配時黑箱，各方看不到錢實際在鏈上怎麼流動。

approach.en: Built an interactive 3D visualization that walks step-by-step through how smart-contract royalty splits move through EVM storage, plus a single-track lifecycle simulation.
approach.zh: 打造互動式 3D 視覺化，一步步呈現智慧合約版稅分配如何流經 EVM storage，並模擬單曲完整生命週期。

impact.en: Turns an invisible on-chain process into something six stakeholder roles can understand — a visual companion to my thesis on smart-contract law & music NFTs.
impact.zh: 把看不見的鏈上流程變成六種角色都看得懂的體驗，是碩論（智慧合約×音樂NFT）的視覺化延伸。

metrics.zh: 逐步呈現 EVM 流程

problem.en: Retail investors juggle price charts and news separately, with no daily forward view.
problem.zh: 散戶看盤與看新聞是分開的，缺少每日的前瞻預測。

approach.en: Combined LSTM time-series forecasting with news-sentiment analysis across Taiwan, US and crypto markets in one live dashboard.
approach.zh: 把 LSTM 時序預測與新聞情緒分析結合，涵蓋台股、美股、加密貨幣，整合成單一即時儀表板。

impact.en: Auto-updates every trading day with zero manual work, giving a one-glance forward signal across three markets.
impact.zh: 每個交易日全自動更新、零人工，三大市場的前瞻訊號一眼掌握。

name.zh: 研究雷達 · 法律金融情報

problem.en: Staying current across IP, blockchain, AI and financial-crime research means checking many sources daily.
problem.zh: 要同時追蹤智財、區塊鏈、AI、金融犯罪的最新研究，得每天翻很多來源。

approach.en: Auto-aggregates news, papers and full-text court judgments across four research fields, daily.
approach.zh: 每日自動聚合四大領域的新聞、論文與判決全文。

impact.en: One daily feed replaces manual multi-source monitoring — built for my own legal research.
impact.zh: 一個每日情報流取代人工多來源監看，為自己的法律研究而做。

name.zh: 司法官・律師複習平台

problem.en: Bar/judicial candidates drown in scattered past papers with no structured, testable way to review.
problem.zh: 考生被散落各處的歷屆考題淹沒，缺乏有結構、可自測的複習方式。

approach.en: Structured 1,800 official exam questions across 4 domains and 6 years by exam-day session, with mask-answer self-testing and TTS read-aloud.
approach.zh: 把 1,800 題官方考題依考試當天節次結構化，涵蓋 4 大領域 6 年，支援遮答案自測與語音念題。

impact.en: One organized, self-quizzing hub replaces dozens of loose PDFs.
impact.zh: 一個有條理、能自測的入口，取代幾十份零散 PDF。

problem.en: Vocabulary apps are either paid or don't tie learning to spaced testing.
problem.zh: 背單字工具不是要付費，就是沒把學習和間隔測驗連起來。

approach.en: Integrated free dictionary + translation APIs to auto-generate pronunciation, examples, translation and grammar, with flashcard / fill-in / spelling quizzes.
approach.zh: 整合免費字典＋翻譯 API 自動產生發音、例句、翻譯與文法，搭配翻卡／填空／拼字三種測驗。

impact.en: A fully free daily learning loop with self-scoring and weak-word review.
impact.zh: 完全免費的每日學習循環，含學習評分與弱點單字複習。
